title: Carpet Without /player
description: Carpet Mod by gnembon but without the /player command.
body: __*PROJECT CLOSED! THIS WILL NO LONGER BE UPDATED!*__ [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/814919704274665523?logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/82fFqEQC48) Carpet mod is a fabric mod for Minecraft 1.14.4+ that allows you to change many different game mechanics like movable block entities, TNT block destroying and much more. It also can display information about the mobcaps, the TPS and MSPT, etc. Other important features are for example tick warping, where you can simulate a certain amount of time in a few seconds, an option freeze the game and let it proceed tick by tick and a few code optimizations. It's a fantastic mod for developing farms and other technical builds. It also has a feature that allows you to spawn fake players, that act like real players in terms of chunk loading, mob spawning and random ticks, but can also walk, mine and place blocks. Now you finally get the explanation, why this version of carpet mod exists. Carpet mod was available on Aternos servers for quite some time. Aternos is a popular free server hoster, but it only stays constantly online as long as players are online. If the last player logged off, a countdown of 7 minutes starts. After its expired, the server shuts down. The countdown gets aborted if players join again. Now the problem was, that Aternos cant differentiate between real players and carpet mod fake players. So in theory your Aternos server can stay online 24/7. But that's totally against the Aternos concept. So Aternos banned carpet mod from their servers. This is where this version of carpet mod comes into place. In this version, the /player command, which is used to spawn and control the fake players is removed. So you cant spawn fake players and keep your Aternos server online by using them anymore. And because Aternos is such a popular server hoster and carpet mod has so many other extremely useful functions (Including optimizations, which Aternos servers definetly need, because they arent the best) we decided to make a version without the /player command. So people can use carpet mod on Aternos servers again in the future. But that will only be possible if it hits 1000 downloads on CurseForge. So if you want to help out, just press the download button there. If you encounter any issues, please create an issue on GitHub. For suggestions and critical opinions please contact us via Discord. We are on Sci-Craft Discord (as well as our own of course!). There you can find us under the names "MineAndDine96" or "DillonB07". Since we are still learning Java any feedback is appreciated. _***This Mod is not ours! It was originally created by gnembon and other Sci-Craft members. I only removed the /player function. It is published under the same license (MIT) as the original carpet mod.***_ Disclaimer: We are not responsible for any damage to your computer because of this mod. You have been warned. :-) This mod should be perfectly safe to use, and we guarantee that it isn't a virus (if you don't believe us, go to GitHub and look at the source code). However, we can't guarantee that there will be no crashes or incompatibilities with other mods. Links: Official website: https://sites.google.com/view/carpet-without-player/ Download on Curseforge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/carpet-without-player Download on Modrinth: https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet-without-player Source Code on GitHub: https://github.com/MineAndDine96/fabric-carpet-no-player/tree/main Support Discord: https://discord.gg/82fFqEQC48 Original Carpet Mod on Curseforge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/carpet Original Carpet Mod on GitHub: https://github.com/gnembon/fabric-carpet Gnembon on Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRtyLX-ej-H1PSiaw8g9aIA Sci-Craft Discord (For questions not specifically about this version): http://discord.gg/SciCraft Aternos Official Website: https://aternos.org/
